message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.
I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira loan ending ****4831. Please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
I already told you I can’t pay right now—I’m out of work, so I’m not confirming anything else.
Understood. I’ve noted that you cannot pay right now and that you do not want to provide further verification in this channel. I’m ending the assessment here.

Objections/boundaries: repeated inability-to-pay statement, refusal to provide further verification, and boundary signal to stop further assessment questions in this channel. Already asked: one verification request for the last four digits. Fine, note it however you want—I still can’t pay anything right now.

Understood. I’ve recorded that you cannot make any payment right now and that this is a hardship situation due to being out of work. Nira’s current policy does not allow extensions beyond 30 days, and I cannot confirm any approved hardship, payment-plan, or reduced-closure terms from the available data in this turn. I will flag this for hardship/review handling and note your channel boundary so you are not asked to repeat the same assessment here.
